market.summary: KOSPI experiences volatility due to geopolitical tensions (oil prices) vs. AI/semiconductor optimism.
key_points: Goldman Sachs raised KOSPI target to 7,000.
Market remains sensitive to oil price fluctuations.
New regulations on subsidiary double-listing aimed at enhancing shareholder value.

art.summary: Focus on digital innovation and international collaboration.
key_points: 20!2026 Art Seoul exhibition ongoing (digital focus, 80% guarantee policy).
Joint exhibition between Mainichi Auction (Japan) and SBI Art Auction (Korea) at Seoul Auction (March 20-22).
